channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.description: The vulnerability, which is allegedly triggered by a corrupted sticker in the messaging app, received a 9.8 CVSS score, but Telegram denies it exists....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: ⚡ Weekly Recap: Telecom Sleeper Cells, LLM Jailbreaks, Apple Forces U.K. Age Checks and More
item.description: Some weeks are loud. This one was quieter but not in a good way. Long-running operations are finally hitting courtrooms, old attack methods are showing up in new places, and research that stopped bein...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: 3 SOC Process Fixes That Unlock Tier 1 Productivity
item.description: What is really slowing Tier 1 down: the threat itself or the process around it? In many SOCs, the biggest delays do not come from the threat alone. They come from fragmented workflows, manual triage s...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Russian CTRL Toolkit Delivered via Malicious LNK Files Hijacks RDP via FRP Tunnels
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a remote access toolkit of Russian-origin that's distributed via malicious Windows shortcut (LNK) files that are disguised as private key folders. The CTRL to...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Estonian hospital sends patient home with other peoples’ health data
item.description: Märten Hallismaa reports: A person who underwent X-ray imaging at West Tallinn Central Hospital (LTKH) was sent home with a USB drive that also contained the personal and health data of other patients...
item.dc:creator: DataBreaches.net

item.title: The State of Secrets Sprawl 2026: 9 Takeaways for CISOs
item.description: Secrets sprawl isn't slowing down: in 2025, it accelerated faster than most security teams anticipated. GitGuardian's State of Secrets Sprawl 2026 report analyzed billions of commits across public Git...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: South African government agency and Spanish psychological software provider victims of cyberattacks by XP95
item.description: Jan Vermeulen reports: Statistics South Africa has become the latest government entity to fall victim to a ransomware attack by the emerging cybercrime group known as XP95. The threat actors claim to ...
item.dc:creator: DataBreaches.net

item.title: Three China-Linked Clusters Target Southeast Asian Government in 2025 Cyber Campaign
item.description: Three threat activity clusters aligned with China have targeted a government organization in Southeast Asia as part of what has been described as a "complex and well-resourced operation." The campaign...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News
